name: BOBCARD ETERNA

rewards.displayCategory: Travel, dining, online, and international spends

domestic: Unlimited complimentary domestic lounge access requires Rs 40,000 net spends in the preceding calendar quarter.
For newly issued fresh cards, the spend threshold is waived in the quarter of card issuance; if the card is issued in the last month of a quarter, the waiver extends through the following quarter.
Interest, fees, reversed transactions, and EMI instalments are excluded from the lounge-eligibility spend calculation.

exclusions: fuel transactions do not earn reward points
accelerated reward points are subject to monthly cap
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus reward points on spending Rs 50,000 within first 60 days
20,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of Rs 5,00,000
additionalBenefits: Free personal accident death cover: air Rs 1 crore, non-air Rs 10 lakh
Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Annual income of Rs 12 lakh or more
selfEmployed: Annual income of Rs 12 lakh or more

internalNotes: Audited against the official Bank of Baroda Eterna product page on 2026-06-14.

The current product page explicitly confirms milestone rewards, cashback redemption at 1 reward point = Rs 0.25, fuel surcharge waiver, insurance cover, and the Rs 12 lakh annual income eligibility threshold.

The current official rewards copy says 15 reward points per Rs 100 on online shopping, international, dining, and travel spends with a maximum of 5,000 reward points per statement, so the accelerated row is modeled as one combined capped bucket rather than separate per-category caps.
BOBCARD's lounge terms PDF dated 1 April 2026 confirms that domestic lounge access requires Rs 40,000 net spends in the preceding calendar quarter, with a fresh-card waiver in the issuance quarter.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
